title: Automatic Storage System
description: A bulk item sorting and storage system. A central input chest connects to a chain of hopper-minecarts or a hopper line that feeds into individual filter hoppers. Each filter hopper is configured with 5 matching items to only accept that item type and deposit into a dedicated double chest. Items not matched by any filter fall through to a misc chest at the end of the chain. Uses comparator signals to stop hopper chains when chests are full. Typical setup: 1 input chest → N filter hoppers below → N labeled double chests.
